---
title: Data processing script
author: Keith Newman
---

This processing script was executed at `r Sys.time()`.

Import data from a CSV

```{r}
imported_data <- read.csv("iris.csv")
```

Perform tests on the data

```{r}
library(cli)
if (nrow(imported_data) > 0L) {
    cli_alert_success("Imported {nrow(imported_data)} row{?s} of data.")
} else {
    cli_alert_danger("Failed to import data!")
}
```

Modify data as needed:

```{r}
library(dplyr)
imported_data <- slice_sample(imported_data, prop = 1)
```

If data was imported, store as a pin

```{r}
library(pins)
board <- board_connect()
pin_write(board, imported_data, name = "modified_iris")
```

Script complete
